negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_201
prompt: The video opens with a scene set in a spacious, well-lit indoor area, possibly a community hall, characterized by high ceilings and large stained-glass windows that allow natural light to illuminate the space. In the foreground, two individuals stand facing a crowd, with one holding a guitar. The person on the left, wearing a horizontally striped shirt, gestures with their right hand, possibly singing or leading a song, while the person on the right, dressed in a solid-colored shirt, holds their guitar across their body. The crowd behind them is diverse, with people in various attire, some clapping and others standing in small groups, all appearing engaged in the event. The atmosphere suggests a communal gathering.  The camera pans from right to left, capturing the dynamic interaction between the performers and the audience. As the video progresses, the individuals in the foreground continue their actions without significant change, maintaining their positions and roles. The crowd remains active, with some individuals clapping and others observing attentively. The final frame captures the same scene, with the guitarists still in the same positions and the crowd continuing their engagement, reinforcing the sense of a continuous and cohesive event.
